name: implement-approved-feature

related_skills.name: code-review
related_skills.why: Review the write-heavy diff for correctness and scope before merging.

related_skills.name: verify
related_skills.why: Run the app/end-to-end to confirm the feature actually works, not just unit tests.

citations: friction: delivered feature does not obviously match the explicit request
friction: exploration appeared to hang, forcing a user interrupt
friction: transient socket error on the 4th cluster during regeneration required a re-run
